raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current priorities","name":"What feels most important for you to get right in this role right now, Tom?","description":"Surfaces his current internal map of what Principal scope means on this team.","purpose":"topic","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visible impact","name":"Where do you think your impact has been most visible to others lately?","description":"Checks whether his work is landing as leverage, not just steady delivery.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Evidence of leverage","name":"What recent decision or change best shows the leverage you're creating?","description":"Forces a concrete example of Principal-level impact rather than general claims.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Expectation alignment","name":"Where do you still need earlier alignment on expectations?","description":"Tests whether he is proactively clarifying scope before work is underway.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Principal judgment","name":"What tradeoff do you think you should be making sooner than you currently do?","description":"Probes whether he is staying in safe execution instead of making hard calls early.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Questioning pattern","name":"What keeps you from asking more questions earlier?","description":"Surfaces the barrier behind the low-question pattern without assuming the cause.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Old assumptions","name":"What assumptions from your last team are you still carrying here?","description":"Checks whether old operating models are shaping his choices on this team.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Cross-team trust","name":"Where are you building trust outside the immediate team?","description":"Looks for evidence of broader relationship-building expected at Principal level.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Earlier signals","name":"What would help you spot expectation drift earlier next time?","description":"Moves toward a practical change in how he reads and surfaces alignment issues.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
